detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Shakti._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Shakti.sol#559-655):
	External calls:
	- swapAndLiquify(contractTokenBalance) (Shakti.sol#621)
		- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: ethAmount}(address(this),tokenAmount,0,0,liqAddress,block.timestamp) (Shakti.sol#683-697)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Shakti.sol#669)
	External calls sending eth:
	- swapAndLiquify(contractTokenBalance) (Shakti.sol#621)
		- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: ethAmount}(address(this),tokenAmount,0,0,liqAddress,block.timestamp) (Shakti.sol#683-697)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _transferAgain(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Shakti.sol#651)
		- _balances[_account] = _balances[_account].sub(_amount) (Shakti.sol#493)
		- _balances[sender] = _balances[sender].sub(amountPreBurn) (Shakti.sol#817)
		- _balances[recipient] = _balances[recipient].add(fees.tAmount) (Shakti.sol#819)
		- _balances[address(this)] = _balances[address(this)].add(fees.tBurn.add(fees.tLiq)) (Shakti.sol#821)
	Shakti._balances (Shakti.sol#289) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Shakti._transferAgain(address,address,uint256,bool) (Shakti.sol#787-839)
	- Shakti.balanceOf(address) (Shakti.sol#433-437)
	- Shakti.burning(address,uint256) (Shakti.sol#489-501)
	- Shakti.constructor() (Shakti.sol#377-397)
	- _transferAgain(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Shakti.sol#651)
		- j_burnFee = j_previousBurnFee (Shakti.sol#529)
		- j_burnFee = 0 (Shakti.sol#515)
	Shakti.j_burnFee (Shakti.sol#327) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Shakti._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Shakti.sol#559-655)
	- Shakti._transferAgain(address,address,uint256,bool) (Shakti.sol#787-839)
	- Shakti.removeAllFee() (Shakti.sol#505-519)
	- Shakti.restoreAllFee() (Shakti.sol#523-531)
	- Shakti.swapAndLiquify(uint256) (Shakti.sol#703-743)
	- restoreAllFee() (Shakti.sol#653)
		- j_burnFee = j_previousBurnFee (Shakti.sol#529)
	Shakti.j_burnFee (Shakti.sol#327) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Shakti._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Shakti.sol#559-655)
	- Shakti._transferAgain(address,address,uint256,bool) (Shakti.sol#787-839)
	- Shakti.removeAllFee() (Shakti.sol#505-519)
	- Shakti.restoreAllFee() (Shakti.sol#523-531)
	- Shakti.swapAndLiquify(uint256) (Shakti.sol#703-743)
	- _transferAgain(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Shakti.sol#651)
		- j_liqFee = j_previousLiqFee (Shakti.sol#527)
		- j_liqFee = 0 (Shakti.sol#517)
	Shakti.j_liqFee (Shakti.sol#325) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Shakti._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Shakti.sol#559-655)
	- Shakti._transferAgain(address,address,uint256,bool) (Shakti.sol#787-839)
	- Shakti.removeAllFee() (Shakti.sol#505-519)
	- Shakti.restoreAllFee() (Shakti.sol#523-531)
	- Shakti.swapAndLiquify(uint256) (Shakti.sol#703-743)
	- restoreAllFee() (Shakti.sol#653)
		- j_liqFee = j_previousLiqFee (Shakti.sol#527)
	Shakti.j_liqFee (Shakti.sol#325) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Shakti._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Shakti.sol#559-655)
	- Shakti._transferAgain(address,address,uint256,bool) (Shakti.sol#787-839)
	- Shakti.removeAllFee() (Shakti.sol#505-519)
	- Shakti.restoreAllFee() (Shakti.sol#523-531)
	- Shakti.swapAndLiquify(uint256) (Shakti.sol#703-743)

detectors.description:
Shakti.swapAndLiquify(uint256) (Shakti.sol#703-743) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- half = autoLPamount.div(2) (Shakti.sol#711)
	- newBalance = ((address(this).balance.sub(initialBalance)).mul(half)).div(otherHalf) (Shakti.sol#737)
detectors.markdown:

	- [newBalance = ((address(this).balance.sub(initialBalance)).mul(half)).div(otherHalf)](Shakti.sol#L737)
